subject: Fix delete flow bug
commit_message:
Fix delete flow bug

Fix the bug in delete flow, when the loop is already undeployed.

Issue-ID: CLAMP-864
Change-Id: I6ca52b260bf2229b8ed28d8ebac93eef65d12d96
Signed-off-by: xuegao <xg353y@intl.att.com>
